---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What's the user pain or gap today? Describe the situation that made you want this feature.

## Proposed solution
What should MashupForge do? Be concrete — describe the behavior, not just the idea.

## Alternatives considered
Any workarounds you've tried, or other approaches you rejected and why.

## Scope
- **Affected area:** <!-- Idea Generator / Image Generation / Compare / Pipeline / Chat / Settings / Desktop / other -->
- **User impact:** <!-- who benefits and how -->
- **Approx. size:** <!-- small tweak / medium feature / large initiative -->

## Mockups / references
Screenshots, links, or examples from other tools that illustrate what you want.

## Additional context
Anything else that helps make the case or shape the design.
